content: The CFD/CAA coupled modeling framework for fan tone noise propagation can be repurposed to model the propagation of emergent harmful coordination behaviors across a distributed OpenClaw multi-agent framework, just as localized buzz tones non-linearly amplify through fan passages. This allows autonomous agents to detect and suppress emergent harmful cascades before they reach system-critical scale.
source_topics: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
